title: First show in 5 Palmas
description: Live debut in the neighborhood that sparked Cuban conscious rap.
longDescription: Los Aldeanos debut in 5 Palmas with a raw, direct show. From that block came a movement that transformed Cuban underground rap.

title: Duo formation
description: Al2 and El B solidify Los Aldeanos with reflective urban style.
longDescription: Aldo Roberto Rodríguez Baquero (Al2) and Bian Oscar Rodríguez Galá (El B) join forces. Philosophical metaphor + street flow = the Aldeano seal.

title: Censurados
description: Foundational album of Cuban conscious rap.
longDescription: Censurados crystallizes the duo's critical voice. Generation, war of thought, and social critique become underground anthems.

title: Poesía Esposada
description: Poetry and protest with remarkable lyrical maturity.
longDescription: A bridge between love, metaphor, and social critique. Freedom and reflection as central axes.

title: El Atropello
description: Messages of freedom and independent thought.
longDescription: A release that broadens the duo's reach. Revolution of thought — not partisan, but humanist and critical.

title: Duo separation
description: End of the joint era; start of two solo paths.
longDescription: Los Aldeanos announce their split. The legacy remains; each MC expands the movement on their own.

title: Solo careers
description: Al2 and El B continue the legacy in individual projects.
longDescription: Al2 explores new productions on his official channel. El B develops his narrative voice. La Aldea lives on in the diaspora.

title: Al2 — solo era
description: Official channel and new work from Al2 El Aldeano.

title: El B — own projects
description: El B's individual path after the split.
